step_rationale: Early AMI risk biomarker; oxidative-stress marker.
mechanism: Cysteic acid elevation indicates cysteine oxidation and myocardial oxidative stress during acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: High-resolution metabolomics study revealing l-homocysteine sulfinic acid, cysteic acid, and carnitine as novel biomarkers for high acute myocardial infarction risk.
